prompt: what roles can be on a file and how does the exclusion flag work?

assertions.text: Mentions all 5 role types: owner, admin, member assistants, external assistants, customer
Correctly states view_for_customer=false excludes BOTH customer AND external assistants together (one flag, not two)
States owner must be a partner (is_partner=true)
Mentions task holders as auto-derived (not a stored role)
